info.title: Qdrant Search Action Group
info.description: Provides semantic search over Aura Bank's historical support tickets and internal Confluence knowledge base.

post.description: Searches 10,000+ historical Aura Bank support tickets using semantic similarity. Use this to find how similar past issues were resolved, identify patterns, or retrieve precedents for the current customer issue.

query.description: A descriptive search query summarising the customer's issue. Be specific — include the issue type, product category, and any key details (e.g. 'unauthorized card transaction refund request checking account').

200.description: Top matching historical tickets with relevance scores and content snippets.

result.description: Formatted list of matching historical tickets.

post.description: Searches Aura Bank's internal Confluence knowledge base for policies, procedures, product information, and operational guidelines. Use this to look up standard procedures, fee structures, policy details, or resolution guidelines for a customer's issue.

query.description: A descriptive search query for the policy or procedure you need. Be specific (e.g. 'billing refund policy process for failed direct debit').

200.description: Top matching Confluence documents with titles and content excerpts.

result.description: Formatted list of matching knowledge base documents.
